name: Mocha Dream Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Spray a 9-inch pie plate with non-stick cooking spray and place it on the baking sheet. Lay 4 phyllo strudel sheets across the plate, extending them over the sides; press gently into the plate. Lay the remaining 4 sheets in the opposite direction across the plate, extending them over the sides to form a crisscross pattern; press gently into the plate. With scissors, cut the edge about 1 inch beyond the rim of the plate. Pierce the crust with a fork. Squeeze the phyllo strudel trimmings into small bundles and place them on the baking sheet. Spray the crust and bundles with cooking spray.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown; cool on a wire rack.
In a blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk; let stand 2 minutes. Add hot milk, cocoa powder, and instant coffee, and process at low speed until completely dissolved, about 2 minutes. Add the remaining ingredients and process at high speed until thoroughly blended, scraping sides once, about 2 minutes.
Pour the mixture into the prepared crust and chill until firm, at least 2 hours. Garnish with phyllo bundles.
